text:
<ComboBox
  labelText="Contact"
  placeholder="Type to search..."
  bind:value={inputValue}
  {items}
/>
Expanded: {expanded}

highlightedId =
    highlightedIndex > -1 && items[highlightedIndex]
      ? `${id}-${items[highlightedIndex].id}`
      : undefined;

highlightedId =
    highlightedIndex > -1
      ? ((filterable ? filteredItems : sortedItems)[highlightedIndex]?.id ??
        null)
      : null;

customValid =
    typeof validate === "function"
      ? validate(useTextMode ? inputValue : String(value ?? ""), locale)
      : undefined;

useFixedPosition =
    effectiveTarget != null &&
    typeof document !== "undefined" &&
    effectiveTarget !== document.body;
